subcodes.first_line: O my God! Thou art He Who hath kindled in the hearts of Thy loved ones the fire of Thy love and hast taken from them the reins of will [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: و انت الذی یا الهی اضرمت فی قلوب احبتک نار محبتک و اخذت منهم زمام الاراده و
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @love of God, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
